comments.summary: Standardisation contract during the bootstrap-optimism step not stated in Methods.
Bootstrap ΔC distribution mixes bootstrap-fit combo C with apparent AJCC C; CI is narrower than the standard Harrell-Lee-Mark estimator.
Score-test vs Cox MLE screen: justify equivalence or spot-check agreement on a sample.
Report bootstrap feature-set stability (Jaccard overlap with apparent 50-gene signature).
Multiple-testing family: state explicitly why the primary outcome is excluded from Bonferroni correction.
Document the one-sample-per-case rule (lexicographic-minimum).
Report calibration slope from cross-validation in addition to apparent.
Document the diagnoses-row selection rule (prefer stage-bearing row).
Confirm uv.lock is committed at the case-study release tag.
Abstract and Introduction must state up-front that the comparator is AJCC (TCGA's record), not BCLC (clinical standard).
Population framing: state in abstract that findings apply to resected surgical-candidate population only.
Aetiology heterogeneity: add a subgroup analysis or explicitly state aetiology data unavailable.
Decision-curve analysis (Vickers-Elkin) on TCGA-LIHC at 5-year thresholds 0.1/0.2/0.3 is required for a clinical-translation positioning.
Expand the treatment-era confounding statement to a full paragraph (pre-immune-checkpoint era).
Strike 'clinically meaningful' from Discussion or define which clinical decision changes.
Competing risks: state more explicitly that OS (not cancer-specific) is the endpoint and discuss transplant/non-cancer death.
Add plain-language summary (~100 words).
Add a Cohort Characteristics table with follow-up and event accrual by stage.
Name the C-statistic explicitly (Harrell vs Uno) and discuss the censoring-induced bias.
TRIPOD-aligned calibration plot at 1, 3, 5 years with Hosmer-Lemeshow p is required.
Add a sample-size / power statement using Pencina-D'Agostino's formula.
Bootstrap optimism CI uses a non-standard estimator; either re-run with paired-optimism or document the deviation.
Schoenfeld for AJCC stage covariate (p=0.034) indicates non-PH for stage; add stratified Cox or time-varying coefficient sensitivity.
Explicitly tally L1-L7 against the Bonferroni-corrected threshold of α/7 = 0.0071.
Fine-Gray sensitivity analysis with cancer-specific death as event and transplant as competing event.
Add Pencina IDI to complement ΔC-index.
Document Breslow tie handling in the score test.
Mention NumPy PCG64 RNG for deterministic seed reproducibility.
Introduction must state the methodological novelty contribution within JCO CCI's recent publications, or reconsider the venue.
Body word count is within limit but revisions will push to ~2,700; track this.
Final PubMed sweep of all references before submission.
Add explicit author-review statement to satisfy ASCO journals' AI disclosure policy.
Replace tag placeholder in Data Availability with concrete case-study-v1.0.0 when ready.
Confirm reference style is rendered as Vancouver-superscript-numeric on the final PDF; verify Villanueva 2015 vs 2019 bib entry.
Align cover-letter language with the manuscript's 'illustrative, not for clinical use' framing.
Figure count budget OK; adding the calibration plot brings it to 5/5.
Consider adding a labeled Plain-language Summary subsection.
Consider shortening the title for PubMed-display compatibility.
